RON=20m ROFF=1Meg THRESHOLD=2 HYSTWD=0.1 IC='OPEN' LOGIC='POS'
RON=20m ROFF=1Meg THRESHOLD=2 HYSTWD=0.1 IC='OPEN' LOGIC='POS'

simulation.analysis_text:
.SIMULATOR SIMPLIS
.PRINT
+ ALL
.OPTIONS
+ PSP_NPT=4001
+ POP_ITRMAX=20
+ POP_OUTPUT_CYCLES=3
+ SNAPSHOT_INTVL=0
+ MIN_AVG_TOPOLOGY_DUR=1a
+ AVG_TOPOLOGY_DUR_MEASUREMENT_WINDOW=128
+ NEW_ANALYSIS
.POP
+ TRIG_GATE={TRIG_GATE}
+ TRIG_COND=0_TO_1
+ MAX_PERIOD=5u
+ CONVERGENCE=1p
+ CYCLES_BEFORE_LAUNCH=5
+ TD_RUN_AFTER_POP_FAILS=-1
.TRAN 60u 0

.GRAPH ":VOUT" axisType="auto" persistence=1 graphName="Buck POP+Tran" curveLabel="VOUT" analysis="tran|pop" xLog="auto" yLog="auto" nowarn=true
.GRAPH ":SW" axisType="auto" persistence=1 graphName="Buck POP+Tran" curveLabel="SW" analysis="tran|pop" xLog="auto" yLog="auto" nowarn=true
.GRAPH ":PWM_HS" axisType="digital" persistence=1 graphName="Buck POP+Tran" curveLabel="PWM_HS" analysis="tran|pop" xLog="auto" yLog="auto" nowarn=true
.GRAPH ":PWM_LS" axisType="digital" persistence=1 graphName="Buck POP+Tran" curveLabel="PWM_LS" analysis="tran|pop" xLog="auto" yLog="auto" nowarn=true
.GRAPH ":TRIG_GATE" axisType="digital" persistence=1 graphName="Buck POP+Tran" curveLabel="TRIG_GATE" analysis="tran|pop" xLog="auto" yLog="auto" nowarn=true

.SIMULATOR DEFAULT
